code:
SELECT poker_player.money_rank
FROM poker_player
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT people_id, MAX(earnings) AS max_earning
    FROM poker_player
    GROUP BY people_id

code: SELECT government_form, SUM(population) AS total_population FROM country WHERE life_expectancy > 72 GROUP BY government_form;
question: Find the government form name and total population for each government form whose average life expectancy is longer than 72.

code:
#1234567890
SELECT c.government_form, SUM(c.population) AS total_population 
FROM country AS c 
JOIN ( 
    SELECT cl.countrycode 
    FROM countrylanguage AS cl 
    WHERE cl.is_official = 'true' 
    GROUP BY cl.countrycode 
    HAVING AVG(cl.percentage) > 72
  ) AS avg_life_expectancy 
ON c.code = avg_life_expectancy.countrycode 
GROUP BY c.government_form;
crawresp:
{
  "code": "#1234567890
SELECT c.government_form, SUM(c.population) AS total_population 
FROM country AS c 
JOIN ( 
    SELECT cl.countrycode 
    FROM countrylanguage AS cl 
    WHERE cl.is_official = 'true' 
    GROUP BY cl.countrycode 
    HAVING AVG(cl.percentage) > 72
  ) AS avg_life_expectancy 
ON c.code = avg_life_expectancy.countrycode 
GROUP BY c.government_form;"
}

SELECT dogs.name as dog_name, treatments.date_of_treatment as treatment_date
FROM dogs
JOIN (
    SELECT breed_code, COUNT(*) as breed_count
    FROM dogs
    GROUP BY breed_code
) bc on dogs.breed_code = bc.breed_code
JOIN treatments on dogs.dog_id = treatments.dog_id
WHERE bc.breed_count = (
    SELECT MIN(breed_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT breed_code, COUNT(*) as breed_count
        FROM dogs
        GROUP BY breed_code
    )
)
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 1;
